memory.summary: On October 11, Andy has several meetings and conversations. At various times, he plans an impromptu performance and creative session at the park by the big oak tree on the same day at 3 PM with Caroline, discusses meeting with Peter to discuss their startup idea at a coffee date on October 11 at 1 PM, plans to collaborate on a project for the mini exhibition at the park next week with Samantha, arranges to meet Mei at the library café on October 11 at 2 PM to discuss her new zine display and exchange sketches, and discusses their musical project with Leo at the town_hall around 2025-10-11 20:00, deciding to meet at the café near the museum on October 14 at 1 PM to brainstorm details for their collaboration. Andy also discusses his knee injury and his busy schedule with Diego at the market around 2025-10-11 21:00, agreeing to meet the next day at 1 PM at the café near the park to discuss ideas for the community garden. In addition, Andy talks to Leo at a café around 2025-10-11 23:00 and suggests a meeting at the park on October 14 at 2 PM for their musical discussion, which they both confirm. Andy also proposes a collaboration with Samantha on her new musical project, agreeing to meet with her on Wednesday at the library café around 3 PM to discuss details. Leo expresses excitement about this collaboration, and they both look forward to creating some beautiful music together.

data.content: Talked to Samantha at museum around 2025-10-12 01:00

Andy: Hey Samantha, it's good to see you again! Remember our conversation about collaborating on that project?

Samantha: Hello Andy. Yes, I do. The meeting is scheduled for tomorrow at the library café, right?

Andy: Exactly! I'm looking forward to it. We can discuss the details of our musical collaboration and perhaps make plans for our regular meetings too.

Samantha: Sounds great, Andy. I'll bring my laptop for brainstorming. See you tomorrow at 1 o'clock sharp.

Andy: Perfect. I'll see you there!

By the way, our schedules for the next few days:
- Andy: 2025-10-14 14:00 @ park: Musical discussion with Leo
- Andy: 2025-10-14 15:00 @ library_cafe: Discuss details for musical collaboration
- Andy: 2025-10-16 19:00 @ restaurant: Double date with you

- Samantha: 2025-10-12 14:00 @ library café: meeting with you for project discussion and coffee
- Samantha: 2025-10-13 13:00 @ library café: meeting with you for lunch and music
- Samantha: 2025-10-13 15:00 @ park: catch up with Leo
Talked to Peter at museum around 2025-10-12 02:00

Andy: Hey Peter, it's great running into you here! I was just admiring those dinosaur sculptures.

Peter: Ah, Andy! I was thinking about our startup idea too. Let's grab a coffee next Tuesday at 3 PM at the library café to flesh it out more? What do you think?

Andy: That sounds perfect, Peter. I'll make sure to mark it in my calendar. Looking forward to it!
Talked to Leo at restaurant around 2025-10-12 10:00

Andy: Hey Leo, great running into you again! I've been meaning to catch up since our chat at the town hall.

Leo: Hi Andy! Just as you were saying, I've got some exciting ideas for our musical collaboration. How about we meet at the library café tomorrow at 1 PM to discuss further?

Andy: Sounds perfect! I'll bring my sketchbook to show you some ideas I've been working on. Let's make it official – see you there at 1 PM sharp tomorrow.

Leo: Agreed! Looking forward to it. Let's keep each other inspired, as promised.

Andy: Absolutely, Leo. Here's to a successful musical project! See you tomorrow.
Talked to Peter at hospital around 2025-10-12 14:00

Andy: Hey Peter, I didn't expect to see you here! I thought we were meeting for coffee tomorrow.

Peter: Yeah, I know, sorry about that. I just thought it'd be good to catch up before our meeting. I've been thinking about our startup idea a lot, and I'm excited to discuss it further.

Andy: Absolutely! Let's grab a quick coffee here at the museum, and then I'll show you some of my latest sketches. How about in an hour?

Peter: Sounds perfect, Andy. See you then.

(Both Andy and Peter's schedules have been updated accordingly: 2025-10-12 15:00 @ museum: Catch up and discuss startup idea)
Talked to Diego at park around 2025-10-12 15:00

Andy: Hey Diego, it's great to see you again at the park! I was just sketching the sunrise.

Diego: Hey Andy! I see you're always out here capturing the beauty of our park. I've been meaning to ask, how's your knee doing?

Andy: It's still a bit iffy, but I'm hoping to get back on track with the community garden soon. Speaking of which, I thought we were meeting today to discuss our plans?

Diego: Absolutely! Let's head over to the café near the park in 30 minutes. I've got some updates on the new seeds I picked up from Mei.

Andy: Sounds perfect! I've also been discussing the details for our startup idea with Leo and Peter, so I'll bring them over for our meeting too.

Diego: That'd be great! Let's make it official, then. Andy: Deal! See you at the café at 14:30. Diego: I'll be there. Let's make this community garden bloom!

memory.summary:
On October 11th, 2025, Samantha met Leo at a cafe and discussed her work with stray animals and Leo's busy music schedule. Leo invited Samantha to meet him at the park by the lake the next day at 1 PM for a bite and music. They also planned to meet again on October 18th at 3 PM at the park by the fountain.

During the following days, Samantha had discussions with Peter and Andy regarding their respective projects and open-source libraries, planning to meet at the library café regularly. She also talked to Diego at the library around 12th October and planned to meet him at the café behind the cat café at 3 PM for a project discussion and coffee.

On October 12th, Samantha met Andy at the museum and discussed their collaboration on a project. They planned to meet at the library café the same day at 1 PM for project discussion and coffee. Andy also shared his upcoming schedule, which includes a musical discussion with Leo at the park, a discussion for musical collaboration at the library café, and a double date at a restaurant.

Samantha's updated schedule now includes meeting Peter at the library café for project discussion and coffee due to their mutual meeting on October 12th at 2 PM. They plan to discuss Samantha's open-source libraries and Peter brings his guitar for music afterwards. They also have a meeting with Leo at the park by the lake and a meeting with Diego at the café behind the cat café for a project discussion and coffee. Their upcoming schedules also include a catch-up on October 13th and a catch-up and street tacos on October 15th at the café.

Caroline: "Absolutely! See you then, Samantha."

Samantha: "Looking forward to it."

She confirmed Mei's attendance at the zine club meeting the next day and arranged to meet for lunch at the café near the park at 1 PM. Caroline also invited Mei for a coffee catch-up at her place that evening at 7 PM, to which Mei agreed and mentioned bringing her archives for their musical ideas discussion. Additionally, Caroline talked to Noor at the market around 6 AM on the same day. She discussed her new startup idea with Noor, who was making exciting progress on her AI project. Caroline proposed turning their catch-up into a double date with Peter and Diego, suggesting they meet at the café on Thursday at 7 PM. Noor agreed, and they decided to grab some street tacos there. The updated schedule includes meetings for the musical project, startup idea, and the new double date and coffee catch-up, all taking place at the café and Caroline's place.

memory.summary:
On October 11, 2025, Diego had a series of meetings and discussions. In the morning, he met with Mei at the market to discuss their AI project, new seeds for the community garden, and scheduled a meeting at the café near the library on Thursday at 1 PM. He also arranged a meeting with Caroline at the park in the afternoon to discuss their musical project, agreeing to meet at the café the next day at 1 PM to further discuss the project.

Later in the evening, Diego spoke with Noor at the market. They discussed the details of the library's running app update with Noor, agreeing to meet at the café the following day at 1 PM. Noor shared exciting news about a new project she's working on with Peter and Caroline, proposing a double date at Diego's place next Thursday at 7 PM. Diego also mentioned their shared interest in helping the stray cats behind the café, planning to discuss this further during their meeting the next day.

The conversation at the restaurant on October 11 was not specified in the provided lines.

On October 12, 2025, Diego had a meeting with Andy to discuss community garden plans at 1 PM at the café near the park. Andy also has this meeting in his schedule.

In the evening of October 12, Diego talked to Samantha at the library, discussing the running app project and scheduling a meeting at the café behind the cat café at 3 PM the same day, which Diego agreed to pay for. They also planned to discuss community garden ideas during this meeting.

Their updated schedules now include meetings with Noor, Mei, Caroline, Peter, Andy, and Samantha. The new meetings include:
- 2025-10-13 19:00 @ café behind the cat café: double date with Noor, Peter, and Caroline
- 2025-10-14 14:00 @ library café: meeting with Samantha for project discussion and coffee (provided by Diego)
- 2025-10-14 15:00 @ café: catch up
- 2025-10-15 17:00 @ café: catch up and grab street tacos with Diego.

memory.summary:
The human, Noor, discusses the AI project's progress with Caroline at the train station on October 11, 2025, at 9 PM. Caroline proposes a meeting at a café to discuss her latest startup idea with Peter and Diego on Wednesday at 1 PM. Noor suggests turning it into a double date and changing the date to Thursday at 7 PM. They decide to share street tacos during the meeting.

Later that night, at around 10:30 PM, Noor talks to Peter at the town hall. Peter suggests a meeting next Tuesday at 3 PM at the park near the big oak tree to discuss the AI project and mentions the other meeting he has planned with Andy and Peter at Andy's studio on the 8th. Noor listens intently and suggests catching up more at the town hall before parting ways.

Peter then proposes another meeting at the library café on the following Wednesday at 1 PM to discuss his startup idea with Noor. Noor agrees, promising to bring fresh coffee, and they finalize the plan.
